---
name: Propose a new skill
about: Suggest a new analysis skill for GrowthLens (you don't have to build it)
title: "[skill] <verb-noun, e.g. churn-analysis>"
labels: ["new-skill"]
---

## What analysis does this skill do?

One or two sentences. What does the user point it at, and what report do they get back?

## When should the agent use it?

The kinds of requests that should trigger it (the words a user would actually type):

-
-

## Proposed method (rough is fine)

The steps you'd take by hand. A bullet list or a framework name is enough — a
maintainer or contributor can shape it into a `SKILL.md`.

1.
2.
3.

## Example input → output

- **Input:** (a URL / a pasted page / a description)
- **Output:** (what the finished report should contain)

## Anything else?

Links to the framework you use, an existing tool that does this, or notes.

---

- [ ] I checked the [catalog](../../README.md#-the-skill-catalog) and this isn't already covered.
- [ ] This analyzes a **business / site / asset**, not a private individual.
